results.title: Spanish streaming platform Filmin acquires Elastica distribution arm in landmark deal
results.description: EXCLUSIVE: The agreement, signed on June 12, brings together two leading Spanish independent film companies while allowing them to operate autonomously.

results.title: Rivals star's Bradford-set drama hailed as a "triumph" is the movie you need to watch tonight
Streamer Filmin acquires Elastica’s distribution arm in landmark Spanish indie deal
results.description: EXCLUSIVE: The agreement, signed on June 12, brings together two leading Spanish independent film companies while allowing them to operate autonomously.
